subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God, Who alone possesseth power and might, Who standeth unique in His grandeur and majesty, and Who revealeth Himself less than a hair's-breadth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی تفرد بالاقتدار و توحد بالعظمه و الاجلال و تجلی اقل من سم
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @martyrs and martyrdom, @preservation; transcription of the Sacred Writings, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
